claims.summary: High-entropy tail features may need bounded headroom above FEATURE_ABS_MAX.
claims.disposition: Verified the current entropy-gated tail-only ceiling rises from 5.0 to at most 6.0 and records clip/loss evidence.

claims.summary: Narrative and reserved dimensions must not be accidentally lifted with the tail.
claims.disposition: Verified narrative dimensions 40-43 remain distinct and reserved dimensions 44-47 remain unchanged/default-off.

claims.summary: Bounded headroom can pass numeric tests while vibrancy still feels muffled.
claims.disposition: Route a capture-first codec continuity comparison; do not infer felt sufficiency from ceiling utilization.

claims.summary: Raising the ceiling to 7.0 or making it more dynamic changes live codec output.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator approval wait.
